# RINGFALL: CHAOS CIRCUIT
Original local-first 3D arcade wrestling game with articulated physics, adaptive quality, an expanded interactive Volt Dome, environmental grapples, and a stable multi-mode camera director.
Public game: /
Health: /api/health
API docs: /api/docs
OpenAPI: /openapi.yaml
No backend, login, runtime network requests, protected actions, or MCP execution are implemented.
